signals.content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronic products to the U.S. and other markets due to supply chain scrutiny. General high-tech trade baseline applies.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国电子产品对美及其他市场的出口，需关注供应链审查。适用一般高科技贸易基线。

checklist.desc: Prepare commercial invoice, packing list, contract, and export license slots for general electronics.
Run China export control and cryptography reviews for wireless/secure computing features.
Review supply chain for any forced labor allegations, especially in Xinjiang-related components.
Ensure accurate origin certificates to avoid transshipment or circumvention claims.
Check RoHS, WEEE, or equivalent requirements for target market if applicable.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has eased export controls for the UAE, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for UAE-bound shipments.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽了对阿联酋的出口管制，降低了某些物项的许可要求。此变更可能影响对阿联酋出口的美国出口管制和实体清单筛查。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单限制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

checklist.desc: 确认设备ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制及是否需要出口许可证。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，确保不涉及被禁实体。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保合规。
评估设备HTS编码是否受Section 301附加关税影响，并计算税率。
如设备含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证及供应商FCC ID。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariffs and BIS export controls, requiring enhanced due diligence on end-users and end-uses.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华半导体出口的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明出货不涉及实体清单上的实体，且不有助于中国军事现代化。该政策与301条款关税及BIS出口管制保持一致，要求对最终用户和最终用途进行更严格的尽职调查。

checklist.desc: 对交易方进行BIS实体清单及SDN清单筛查，保留筛查记录及最终用户声明。
确认10位HS编码，评估是否落入301条款附加关税范围，计算额外关税成本。
确认芯片性能参数（如制程、带宽）是否触发先进芯片出口管制门槛。
获取客户签署的最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事或监控用途。
如涉及管制物项，准备BIS出口许可证申请材料，包括技术说明和交易背景。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化可能影响某些枪支出口的许可要求。

checklist.desc: 确认产品ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管辖及许可例外适用性。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单及拒绝人员名单筛查。
确认HTS编码是否涉及301关税清单，计算附加关税成本。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事用途。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities, increasing the risk of export restrictions for semiconductor and electronic components. Companies must verify end-users and end-uses to avoid penalties.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司，增加了半导体和电子元件的出口限制风险。企业必须核实最终用户和最终用途，以避免处罚。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Verify that all parties in the transaction, including affiliates, are not on the Entity List or subject to expanded restrictions.
Obtain signed end-use and end-user certifications from US customers for items subject to BIS controls.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that previously allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass U.S. export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and related technology to China, particularly targeting entities that may be used for military purposes. Companies must now ensure compliance with updated BIS regulations, including enhanced end-user and end-use checks.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部已堵住此前允许外国在华半导体工厂规避美国出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对向中国出口先进半导体制造设备及相关技术的限制，尤其针对可能用于军事目的的实体。企业必须确保遵守更新后的BIS法规，包括加强最终用户和最终用途核查。

checklist.desc: 更新受控物项清单，确认出口产品是否属于新增管制范围，并获取最终用户和最终用途声明。
对交易方进行实体清单筛查，确保未涉及被制裁的中国半导体工厂。

checklist.task: 先进半导体设备技术参数核查
checklist.desc: 确认设备技术参数（如制程节点、晶体管密度）是否符合EAR管制阈值。
评估产品HTS编码是否受Section 301附加关税影响，并计算税率。
如涉及无线通信功能，确认设备已取得FCC Part 15/18认证。
